images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a single glowing workstation running a polished automation tool, alone in a wide dark open-plan office full of empty unused desks receding into shadow — a capability that never spread beyond one person. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlight on the one lit desk, thin red (#eb2027) accent only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
